content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-improvement loop can be modified to integrate multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-refinement system where each iteration of Self-Refine is grounded in contrasting perspectives rather than a single model’s unidirectional feedback. This hybrid system addresses the blind spot limitation where a single LLM can fail to identify flaws in its own output that would be obvious from an alternative problem-solving frame.
